UnitedHealth ( (UNH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On November 18, 2025, UnitedHealth Group announced the appointment of Scott Gottlieb, M.D. as an independent director. Dr. Gottlieb, known for his tenure as FDA commissioner from 2017 to 2019, is recognized for his efforts in promoting transparency, patient safety, and medical innovation. His appointment is expected to bring valuable insights to UnitedHealth, given his extensive experience in healthcare policy and regulation.

data.title: Spark Energy Minerals Launches $500,000 Private Placement for Arapaima Drilling
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

St. Anthony Gold Corp ( (TSE:SPRK) ) has issued an update.

Spark Energy Minerals Inc. announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to $500,000 by offering 10,000,000 units at $0.05 per unit. The funds will support the near-term drilling program at the Arapaima Project in Brazil, with the remainder allocated to general working capital. This move is expected to advance Spark’s exploration efforts in Brazil’s Lithium Valley, potentially enhancing its market position in the critical minerals sector.

More about St. Anthony Gold Corp

Spark Energy Minerals Inc. is a Canadian company focused on the exploration and development of critical minerals essential for the clean-energy transition. The company primarily operates in Brazil’s emerging Lithium Valley, known for its potential in lithium, gallium, and rare-earth elements. Spark’s flagship project, the Arapaima Project, covers approximately 91,900 hectares and targets lithium and gallium-REE mineralization. The company is dedicated to responsible exploration and supporting Brazil’s sustainable critical-minerals supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 384,580

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$7.15M

Diana Shipping ( (DSX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On November 19, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. announced significant changes in its executive leadership, with the resignation of President Anastasios Margaronis and co-Chief Financial Officer Ioannis Zafirakis, effective January 1, 2026. The company also appointed new officers, including Ioannis Zafirakis as President, Evangelos Sfakiotakis as Chief Technical Investment Officer, Margarita Veniou as Secretary and Corporate Contact, and Maria Dede as Treasurer. These changes are expected to impact the company’s strategic direction and operational management, potentially influencing its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

Diana Shipping Inc. operates in the shipping industry, primarily focusing on the transportation of dry bulk cargoes. The company manages a fleet of bulk carriers and is involved in the strategic management and operational performance of these vessels.

Covenant Logistics Group ( (CVLG) ) has shared an update.

On November 20, 2025, Covenant Logistics Group‘s Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share for Class A and Class B common stock. This dividend, part of a previously approved program, will be payable to stockholders of record on December 5, 2025, and is expected to be distributed on December 26, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to returning value to its shareholders through regular dividends.

The most recent analyst rating on (CVLG) stock is a Hold with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Covenant Logistics Group stock, see the CVLG Stock Forecast page.

Technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and the earnings call highlighted significant operational challenges. The stock’s valuation is moderate, providing some support to the score.

To see Spark’s full report on CVLG stock, click here.

More about Covenant Logistics Group

Covenant Logistics Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides a range of transportation and logistics services across the United States. It specializes in asset-based expedited and dedicated truckload capacity, asset-light warehousing, transportation management, and freight brokerage. Additionally, it offers revenue equipment sales and leasing services through its affiliate, Transport Enterprise Leasing. The company’s Class A common stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ‘CVLG.’
